betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ring Accelerator: Synchrotron Accelerator Controller§f

§aThe Synchrotron is the ring accelerator for GeV-scale particle beams.§f
The §bSynchrotron Accelerator Controller§f (`qmd:ring_accelerator_controller`) is the brain of the §bRing Accelerator§f (Synchrotron) multiblock. It is the second tier of QMD accelerators — once built, a Synchrotron can repeatedly circulate and re-accelerate a particle beam, reaching far higher energies than a single-pass LINAC.

§6Controller Crafting Recipe§f:
Per the §bminecraft.crafting§f grid, the Synchrotron Controller is crafted from:
- §bElite Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:3`)
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:10`)
- §bAdvanced Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:5`)
- §bAccelerator Casing§f (`qmd:accelerator_casing`)

§6Synchrotron Multiblock Structure (RingAcceleratorLogic.java:78)§f:
- §bShape§f: a square ring (LengthX = LengthZ) with §bY-thickness = §6getThickness()§f§f (a constant for the structure).
- §bSize limits§f: §cLengthX ≥ 11§f and §cLengthX ≤ 100§f (`QMDConfig.accelerator_ring_min_size` = 11, `accelerator_ring_max_size` = 100, both configurable in QMDConfig). The exterior must be a square with odd or even length within the configured range.
- §bBeam axis§f: the interior axis positions (the "ring" of the accelerator) must be filled with §bAccelerator Beam Blocks§f (`TileAcceleratorBeam`).
- §bDipoles§f: each corner of the ring must contain a valid §bDipole Magnet§f (`isValidDipole(pos, false)`).
- §bBeam ports§f: §bAccelerator Beam Ports§f (`TileAcceleratorBeamPort`) are placed on the ring as input/output interfaces.
- §bPower & cooling§f: at least one §bAccelerator Energy Port§f and §bAccelerator Cooler Vent§f (any tier) must be on the ring.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bAdvanced Processor§f → requires §bBasic Processor§f + Redstone + §bHafnium Oxide§f + §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f (QMDRecipes.java:504). P-Type requires a §bTarget Chamber§f to manufacture from §bBoron-11 ions§f.
- §bExtreme Alloy Ingot§f → end-game alloy from §bHBM's NTM Alloy Furnace§f / §bNC Alloy Furnace§f.
- §bElite Plating§f → end-game plating from §bNC Manufactory§f.
- §bAccelerator Casing§f → crafted from §bStainless Steel Ingot§f, §bTough Alloy Ingot§f, and accelerator components.

§6Ring Accelerator Recipes (per `RingAcceleratorLogic.refreshBeam()`)§f:
- Each revolution adds energy via §eEquations.linacEnergyGain(cavityVoltage, stack)§f minus focus loss `Equations.focusLoss(beamLength, stack)`.
- The ring's §bquadrupoleStrength§f restores focus via `Equations.focusGain(quadrupoleStrength, stack)` per revolution.
- Output beam exits through an OUTPUT port with cumulative energy and corrected focus.

§cWarning§f: A Synchrotron must satisfy the multiblock validation `isMachineWhole()` (line 79) — incorrect height, non-square footprint, missing dipoles in corners, or non-beam blocks on the ring axis will prevent formation.

§eTip§f: Start with a §b11×11×5§f Synchrotron (smallest legal size) to learn the structure before scaling up. A larger ring stores more energy per pass but loses more focus per revolution — the §bQuadrupole Electromagnet§f strength (configurable per controller) sets the focus gain budget.
